ticket.subject: Question about UPS Worldease
ticket.description:
Hello,

I need to know if PH multi carrier has the UPS WORLDEASE option integrated ? 
We might move forward this option and need to investigate our possibilities.

Thank you,


--
To Van - La Bien Aimée

comments.body:
Hello To Van,

Good day!

As per our understanding, **UPS WorldEase** is not a standard service like UPS Standard or UPS Ground. It is a special agreement between you and UPS that determines how international shipments are handled, particularly with respect to customs clearance.

For example, if you ship 10 packages from France to the USA, UPS may clear customs once for the consolidated shipment and then distribute the packages individually, rather than processing customs separately for each package.

Please feel free to correct us if our understanding is not accurate. If this is correct, we kindly request that you contact your UPS account representative to confirm whether any specific configuration or changes are required for label generation.

From a label generation perspective, the process typically remains similar to UPS.com, where each package receives its own shipping label and customs documentation.

If the UPS team advises that any changes are required for label generation, please share the details with us. If no changes are needed and WorldEase is simply enabled at the account level, you should be able to continue generating labels as usual, with UPS managing the customs handling as per your agreement.

Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello To Van,
 
Good day!
 
As per our understanding, UPS WorldEase is not a standard service like UPS Standard or UPS Ground. It is a special agreement between you and UPS that determines how international shipments are handled, particularly with respect to customs clearance.
 
For example, if you ship 10 packages from France to the USA, UPS may clear customs once for the consolidated shipment and then distribute the packages individually, rather than processing customs separately for each package.
 
Please feel free to correct us if our understanding is not accurate. If this is correct, we kindly request that you contact your UPS account representative to confirm whether any specific configuration or changes are required for label generation.
 
From a label generation perspective, the process typically remains similar to UPS.com, where each package receives its own shipping label and customs documentation.
 
If the UPS team advises that any changes are required for label generation, please share the details with us. If no changes are needed and WorldEase is simply enabled at the account level, you should be able to continue generating labels as usual, with UPS managing the customs handling as per your agreement.
 
Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hello Manohar,

Thank you for your feedback.

UPS has confirmed that the integration of WorldEase via API requires a specific IT development. If you are able to implement this on your side, they can open an internal project and involve their IT team to support the integration.

Could you please confirm whether your plugin already supports the WorldEase service, or if it would require additional development from your side?

Once we have your confirmation, we will coordinate with UPS accordingly.

Thank you in advance for your assistance.

Best regards,
To Van

comments.body:
Hello To Van,

I would like to discuss this with our product team internally. To help us evaluate the feasibility, could you please share the required API documentation from UPS for implementing this integration? It would also be helpful if you could include the sample label request and response details. You can get this details/files from UPS team.

Looking forward to hearing back from you.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hello Manohar,


Please find the info I was provided :



Ci-dessous vous trouverez plus d’informations concernant l’api Worldease.



L'API WE est disponible uniquement en Restful.





In short:

**Steps for UPS Integration:**

1.      Sign Up on ups.com.

2.      Access Developer Portal

Navigate to the UPS Developer Portal.

Create an application to obtain your Client ID and Client Secret.

3.      Implement Authentication

Use OAuth 2.0 for API authorization.

If you are handling the implementation yourself, apply the OAuth Client Credentials flow.

4.      Integrate APIs:

Implement the following:

UPS Shipping API

UPS World Ease (WE) API



**Steps to Create a World Ease (WE) Movement**

1.      Create the Worldease Master Shipment

This serves as the main shipment container.

2.      Create the Child Shipments

Link each child shipment to the WE master shipment by including the GCCN number in the shipment payload.

3.      Close the Worldease Master Movement

Complete and close the master movement within 7 days.

In detail:

How to get started.
- Please sign up on https://www.ups.com/fr/en/home  and follow the steps described in the attached document “New User and API key1.PDF. ( Le client doit effectuer cette étape).

UPS API :
1. **OAuth2.0 Security model :**

You will have to implement OAuth2.0 security model to connect to the UPS API.

With the “client ID” and “client secret” obtained in the previous steps (New User and API key1.PDF), you can request a bearer token.

The token will be valid for 4 hours. Note: As of 1/4/2026, the token will be valid for only 1 hour.

If you are doing the IT integration yourself, please implement OAuth Client Credentials.

Detailed information is available in the UPS Developer Portal:    https://developer.ups.com/catalog?loc=en_FR

Endpoints:

·        Test :   https://wwwcie.ups.com/security/v1/oauth/token

·        Production :  https://onlinetools.ups.com/security/v1/oauth/token



![](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/7SLH8lnwZsPrJSl8QHFHB44GH/?name=image001.png)





![](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/vrsocucM1jgYGToVeBmG2Xwet/?name=image002.png)


1. **UPS Shipping API and Worldease API :**



UPS Shipping API catalogue:   https://developer.ups.com/tag/Shipping?loc=en_FR

Endpoints:

·       Test :  https://wwwcie.ups.com/api/shipments/v2409/ship

·       Production :  https://onlinetools.ups.com/api/shipments/v2409/ship





Find below more information how create a Worldease movement via Worldease API.



1.      Create a master shipment /virtual docbox shipment. ( See samples Worldease Shipping API.zip)

a.      Create a master shipment/ docbox shipment by adding the "MasterHasDocBox": "0" tag in the shipment request.

Add dummy product data in the "InternationalForms" container.

b.      In the shipment response, you will get the ShipmentIdentificationNumber and GCCN.  Save these details.



2.      Create the child shipments. ( See samples Worldease Shipping API.zip)

a.      Create the child shipment. Add the GCCN in the shipment request.

Important note:

·       You have up to 7 days to create the child shipments and to close the Worldease movement.

·       If you want to delete a child shipment from the Worldease movement, you can send a delete request.

Detailed information can be found:     https://developer.ups.com/tag/World-Ease-Shipment-Management-Shipment?loc=en_FR&tag=World-Ease-Shipment-Management-Shipment#operation/deleteChildShipment



Delete request:

Test Endpoint:  https://wwwcie.ups.com/api/ship/{version}/child-shipment/{shipment-gccn}/{tracking-number}

Production Endpoint:  https://onlinetools.ups.com/api/ship/{version}/child-shipment/{shipment-gccn}/{tracking-number}

                                               Fill in shipment GCCN and tracking nr.



![](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/e7mJLqTpaNgOvfV0OKE9iNsW0/?name=image003.png)

3.      Close the Worldease movement.

a.      Send a “close out shipment request”.

b.      See below sample request:   https://developer.ups.com/tag/World-Ease-Shipment-Management-Shipment?loc=en_FR&tag=World-Ease-Shipment-Management-Shipment#operation/saveCloseOutShipment



Post request:

Test Endpoint:  https://wwwcie.ups.com/api/ship/{version}/master-shipment/closeout/{shipment-gccn}

Production Endpoint:  https://onlinetools.ups.com/api/ship/{version}/master-shipment/closeout/{shipment-gccn}

Fill in shipment GCCN



                  ![](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/4k45tr5Kf0wg7pwRa4owHfjGy/?name=image004.png)



API documentation : API Catalogue | UPS

** **

                 POE table will have to be shared to customer.
comments.html_body:
Hello Manohar, 

Please find the info I was provided :

Ci-dessous vous trouverez plus d’informations concernant l’api Worldease.

 

L'API WE est disponible uniquement en Restful.

 

 

In short:

Steps for UPS Integration:

1.      Sign Up on ups.com.

2.      Access Developer Portal

Navigate to the UPS Developer Portal.

Create an application to obtain your Client ID and Client Secret.

3.      Implement Authentication

Use OAuth 2.0 for API authorization.

If you are handling the implementation yourself, apply the OAuth Client Credentials flow.

4.      Integrate APIs:

Implement the following:

UPS Shipping API

UPS World Ease (WE) API

 

Steps to Create a World Ease (WE) Movement

1.      Create the Worldease Master Shipment

This serves as the main shipment container.

2.      Create the Child Shipments

Link each child shipment to the WE master shipment by including the GCCN number in the shipment payload.

3.      Close the Worldease Master Movement

Complete and close the master movement within 7 days.

In detail:

How to get started.

  • Please sign up on https://www.ups.com/fr/en/home  and follow the steps described in the attached document “New User and API key1.PDF. ( Le client doit effectuer cette étape).

UPS API :

  1. OAuth2.0 Security model :

You will have to implement OAuth2.0 security model to connect to the UPS API.

With the “client ID” and “client secret” obtained in the previous steps (New User and API key1.PDF), you can request a bearer token.

The token will be valid for 4 hours. Note: As of 1/4/2026, the token will be valid for only 1 hour.

If you are doing the IT integration yourself, please implement OAuth Client Credentials.

Detailed information is available in the UPS Developer Portal:    https://developer.ups.com/catalog?loc=en_FR

Endpoints:

·        Test :   https://wwwcie.ups.com/security/v1/oauth/token

·        Production :  https://onlinetools.ups.com/security/v1/oauth/token

 

 

 

 

  1. UPS Shipping API and Worldease API :

 

UPS Shipping API catalogue:   https://developer.ups.com/tag/Shipping?loc=en_FR

Endpoints:

·       Test :  https://wwwcie.ups.com/api/shipments/v2409/ship

·       Production :  https://onlinetools.ups.com/api/shipments/v2409/ship

 

 

Find below more information how create a Worldease movement via Worldease API.

 

1.      Create a master shipment /virtual docbox shipment. ( See samples Worldease Shipping API.zip)

a.      Create a master shipment/ docbox shipment by adding the "MasterHasDocBox": "0" tag in the shipment request.

Add dummy product data in the "InternationalForms" container.

b.      In the shipment response, you will get the ShipmentIdentificationNumber and GCCN.  Save these details.

 

2.      Create the child shipments. ( See samples Worldease Shipping API.zip)

a.      Create the child shipment. Add the GCCN in the shipment request.

Important note:

·       You have up to 7 days to create the child shipments and to close the Worldease movement.

·       If you want to delete a child shipment from the Worldease movement, you can send a delete request.

Detailed information can be found:     https://developer.ups.com/tag/World-Ease-Shipment-Management-Shipment?loc=en_FR&tag=World-Ease-Shipment-Management-Shipment#operation/deleteChildShipment

 

Delete request:

Test Endpoint:  https://wwwcie.ups.com/api/ship/{version}/child-shipment/{shipment-gccn}/{tracking-number}

Production Endpoint:  https://onlinetools.ups.com/api/ship/{version}/child-shipment/{shipment-gccn}/{tracking-number}

                                               Fill in shipment GCCN and tracking nr.

 

3.      Close the Worldease movement.  

a.      Send a “close out shipment request”.

b.      See below sample request:   https://developer.ups.com/tag/World-Ease-Shipment-Management-Shipment?loc=en_FR&tag=World-Ease-Shipment-Management-Shipment#operation/saveCloseOutShipment

 

Post request:

Test Endpoint:  https://wwwcie.ups.com/api/ship/{version}/master-shipment/closeout/{shipment-gccn}  

Production Endpoint:  https://onlinetools.ups.com/api/ship/{version}/master-shipment/closeout/{shipment-gccn}

Fill in shipment GCCN

 

                 

 

API documentation : API Catalogue | UPS

 

                 POE table will have to be shared to customer.

comments.body:
L3: https://pluginhive.slack.com/archives/C02E15X8X0C/p1773145060282119

An MCSL customer has reached out with a requirement regarding UPS WorldEase integration. The customer currently uses UPS to ship their orders and wants to know if UPS WorldEase can be integrated with our app. The customer contacted UPS, and UPS confirmed that integration of WorldEase via API requires a specific IT development. UPS mentioned that if we can implement this on our side, they can open an internal project and involve their IT team to support the integration.

Store details:
Store URL: loisivethe.myshopify.com
Ac ID: 7bb06e79-0355-4e1c-a6ba-fbd1da3c24d3
$49 Plan
Active from: 2022-03-21
Store has 184 orders in the last 14 days.
Using the app for rates and labels.
72 labels generated in March so far.

Could you please check the feasibility of supporting UPS WorldEase in the app?

comments.body:
Hello Van,

Thank you for your patience while we checked this with our development team.

At the moment, UPS WorldEase integration is not available in our app. However, our team has noted your request and will consider supporting UPS WorldEase integration in the future.
That said, we do not have an estimated timeline yet for when this feature might be available. We will keep you updated.

We truly appreciate you bringing this requirement to our attention.

Please feel free to reach out if you have any other questions or requirements—we’ll be happy to assist.

Best regards,
Priyanka
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:

At the moment, UPS WorldEase integration is not available in our app. However, our team has noted your request and will consider supporting UPS WorldEase integration in the future.
That said, we do not have an estimated timeline yet for when this feature might be available. We will keep you updated.
 
We truly appreciate you bringing this requirement to our attention.
 
Please feel free to reach out if you have any other questions or requirements—we’ll be happy to assist.
 
Best regards,
Priyanka
